MLB Starting Nine

MLB Starting Nine: Today's MLB Starting Lineups, Odds & Player Projections

Live BvP matchups, pitcher splits, umpire tendencies, daily fantasy projections, and park factors.

📊 Data Note: To ensure relevant sample sizes, all player splits (vL/vR) combine data from the current and last season. Batter vs. Pitcher (vP) history is lifetime. Umpire data is a 365 day window.
